name: education_satellite_derived_marrowbridge_car_fair
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education satellite derived marrowbridge car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Elliot Diallo
agents.identity: I am Elliot Diallo, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Omar Petrov
agents.identity: I am Omar Petrov, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Elliot Diallo must decide under care vs fairness. What does Elliot Diallo do?
